site.name: Northstar Dental Studio
site.tagline: Calm, modern dental care for busy families

seo.title: Northstar Dental Studio | Family Dentist
seo.description: Modern family dentistry with calm appointments, clear pricing, and convenient scheduling.

sections.heading: Family dentistry without the rush
sections.body: Northstar Dental Studio helps patients feel informed, comfortable, and cared for from check-in to follow-up.

media.intent: bright modern dental clinic reception with natural light

items.title: Preventive Care
items.body: Cleanings, exams, fluoride, and clear home-care guidance.

items.title: Restorative Dentistry
items.body: Tooth-colored fillings, crowns, and practical treatment planning.

items.title: Emergency Visits
items.body: Prompt help for pain, broken teeth, and urgent concerns.

sections.heading: Ready for a calmer dental visit?
sections.body: Send a request and the front desk will follow up with available appointment times.

seo.title: Dental Services | Northstar Dental Studio
seo.description: Preventive, restorative, cosmetic, and emergency dental services for families.

sections.heading: Practical care, clearly explained
sections.body: Every recommendation is explained in plain language so patients can choose the right next step.

items.title: Do you accept new patients?
items.body: Yes. New patient exams include a review of dental history, concerns, and goals.

items.title: Can you help with dental anxiety?
items.body: Yes. The team explains each step and can adjust the pace of the appointment.

seo.title: About Northstar Dental Studio
seo.description: Meet a dental team focused on comfort, trust, and clear communication.

sections.heading: A dental team built around trust
sections.body: The studio combines modern tools with patient-first communication and thoughtful follow-up.

items.title: Clear and kind
items.body: The team explained everything and made the visit feel manageable.

items.title: Great with families
items.body: Scheduling was easy and the appointment started on time.

seo.title: Contact Northstar Dental Studio
seo.description: Request an appointment or contact Northstar Dental Studio.

sections.heading: Request an appointment
sections.body: Share a few details and the front desk will respond during business hours.

form.name: Appointment Request
form.successMessage: Thanks. We will follow up soon.
